name: caff
description: Conversational Agent Framework & Playground — a local multi-agent chat platform with built-in game modes and evaluation tooling.

scripts.check: node --check public/app.js && node --check public/personas.js && node --check public/skills.js && node --check public/projects.js && node --check public/metrics.js && node --check public/eval-cases.js && node --check public/skill-tests.js && node --check public/shared/api-client.js && node --check public/shared/model-options.js && node --check public/shared/avatar.js && node --check public/shared/toast.js && node --check public/shared/clipboard.js && node --check public/shared/safe-markdown.js && node --check public/chat/conversation-list.js && node --check public/chat/participant-pane.js && node --check public/chat/message-timeline.js && node --check public/chat/conversation-settings.js && node --check public/chat/undercover-panel.js && node --check public/chat/werewolf-panel.js && node --check public/chat/mention-menu.js && node --check public/chat/conversation-pane.js
scripts.start:dev: npm run build && npm run start
scripts.test:fast: npm run check && npm run build && node tests/runtime/app-config.test.js && node tests/runtime/agent-tool-bridge.test.js && node tests/runtime/agent-eval-report.test.js && node tests/runtime/chat-bridge-replay.test.js && node tests/runtime/turn-orchestrator.test.js && node tests/runtime/agent-chat-tools.test.js && node tests/runtime/pi-skill-test-sandbox-extension.test.js && node tests/runtime/message-tool-trace.test.js && node tests/runtime/werewolf-game.test.js && node tests/runtime/skill-loading.test.js && node tests/runtime/env-local-loader.test.js && node tests/runtime/ensure-build.test.js && node tests/runtime/feishu-delivery.test.js && node tests/runtime/feishu-long-connection.test.js && node tests/http/request-body.test.js && node tests/http/feishu-controller.test.js && node tests/storage/chat-store.test.js && node tests/storage/run-store.test.js && node tests/runtime/pi-runtime.test.js
scripts.test: npm run test:fast && npm run test:smoke

author: Koumakan-Madoka
